---
title: TBD 
# subtitle: Asistente de Investigación COES
# contacto: kevin.carrasco@ug.uchile.cl
# github: https://github.com/Kevin-carrasco
# web: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kevin-carrasco-quintanilla/
# image: "featured.jpg"
# about:
#   template: trestles
#   image-shape: round
#   links:
#     - icon: envelope
#       href: mailto:kevin.carrasco@ug.uchile.cl
#       target: _blank
#       text: Contacto
#     - icon: github
#       href: https://github.com/Kevin-carrasco
#       target: _blank
#       text: Github
#     - icon: globe
#       href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kevin-carrasco-quintanilla/
#       target: _blank
#       text: Web Personal
# format: 
#   html: 
#    theme: ../../equipo.scss
---
